filename: ONCOSYS tumor and organoid sequencing plan.pptx
full_text:
Genomic and transcriptomic analysis of fresh-frozen ovarian cancer source tumor and matched organoids

 - WGS or WES 
 - DNA from Fresh frozen tissues and blood samples. N
 - number of samples 6 ( 3 tissue + 3 blood)
 - Germline and somatic mutations 
 - Tumor CNVs (and potentially allelic imbalances (WES backbone?))
 - RNA seq 
 - total RNA from fresh-frozen tumor and organoids. 
 - Number of samples 5-8 each- total 16 
 - Comparison of gene expression profiles of organoids vs fresh tumor

 - SNP array 
 - DNA from fresh-frozen samples plus 2 FFPE block (diagnosis sample). Number of samples 5-8 tumor samples and organoids each + 2 FFPE)
 - Allelic imbalances

1
